name: FolderTree
description: File and folder manager widget with hierarchical structure and bulk metadata editing for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: graphqlEndpoint
configOptions.label: GraphQL Endpoint
configOptions.description: Full URL of the FileNet Content Engine GraphQL API endpoint

configOptions.name: repositoryIdentifier
configOptions.label: Repository Identifier
configOptions.description: FileNet repository identifier (e.g., 'OS1')

configOptions.name: rootFolderPath
configOptions.label: Root Folder Path
configOptions.description: FileNet folder path to start browsing from

configOptions.name: showDocumentDetails
configOptions.label: Show Document Details
configOptions.description: Show document version and file size details in the list

configOptions.name: allowMultiSelect
configOptions.label: Allow Multi-Select
configOptions.description: Allow multiple files to be selected simultaneously for bulk operations

configOptions.name: showFileActions
configOptions.label: Show File Actions
configOptions.description: Show copy and delete action buttons for individual files

configOptions.name: updateAbleFields
configOptions.label: Updateable Fields
configOptions.description: Comma-separated list of updateable field names (e.g., 'author,department,status')

configOptions.name: enableFolderExpansion
configOptions.label: Enable Folder Expansion
configOptions.description: Allow folders to be expanded/collapsed to show nested contents

configOptions.name: showSelectionControls
configOptions.label: Show Selection Controls
configOptions.description: Show 'Select all / Unselect all' controls at the top

configOptions.name: showFileCount
configOptions.label: Show File Count
configOptions.description: Display the total number of files in the list

configOptions.name: autoSave
configOptions.label: Auto Save
configOptions.description: Automatically save changes when metadata is modified

configOptions.name: PropertyOne
configOptions.label: Property One
configOptions.description: Custom property name for Label One (e.g., 'DocumentLanguage')

configOptions.name: PropertyTwo
configOptions.label: Property Two
configOptions.description: Custom property name for Label Two (e.g., 'DocumentType')

configOptions.name: enableDebugLogging
configOptions.label: Enable Debug Logging
configOptions.description: Enable console logging for debugging

configOptions.name: dateFormat
configOptions.label: Date Format
configOptions.description: Date format string (e.g., 'YYYY-MM-DD', 'DD/MM/YYYY')

configOptions.name: showDetailsPanel
configOptions.label: Show Details Panel
configOptions.description: Show or hide the details/update panel on the right side

configOptions.name: onSelectionChange
configOptions.label: On Selection Change
configOptions.description: Event fired when file selection changes

configOptions.name: onSave
configOptions.label: On Save
configOptions.description: Event fired when Save button is clicked

configOptions.name: onCopyFile
configOptions.label: On Copy File
configOptions.description: Event fired when copy button is clicked

configOptions.name: onDeleteFile
configOptions.label: On Delete File
configOptions.description: Event fired when delete button is clicked
